title: ALL FOR PAWS Puppy Heartbeat Toy-Little Buddy HeartBeat Sheep, Dog Heartbeat Toy For Separation Anxiety Relief, Puppy Heartbeat Stuffed Animal Anxiety Calming Behavioral Aid Plush Toy for Dogs Cats
features: 【Real Heartbeat Simulation for Comfort】The All For Paws Heartbeat Sheep is designed to simulate a mother's heartbeat, providing your pet with warmth and security. This helps reduce anxiety, especially for puppies or kittens recently separated from their mothers, making it easier for them to adjust to new surroundings.

【Soft and Premium Materials】This dog calming toy is soft, durable, and safe for your dog to chew or bite. It's easy to clean and maintain, can be machine washable with the heart removed, providing a long-lasting source of comfort for your furry friend.

【Ideal Sleep Aid to Reduce Nighttime Whining】The heartbeat sheep is a perfect sleep aid for pets that experience nighttime anxiety or restlessness. The gentle heartbeat sound helps them relax and fall asleep faster, reducing separation anxiety and providing both you and your pet with a peaceful night.

【Best Gift for Pet & Comfort Toy for Puppy】The All for Paws plush toy with heartbeat simulate is suitable for all puppies, small, medium, large dogs, helps pets reduce anxiety, tension, loneliness, behavior training, insomnia aid, soothes dogs and more.

【Battery Powered for Long-Lasting Comfort】Powered by standard AAA batteries (not included), the heartbeat module offers long-lasting use, providing extended comfort for your pet. The batteries are easy to replace, ensuring your pet always has a calming companion when needed.
